name: XSA-all + Soft-Round QAT + Full GPTQ + MLP 3.5x + AdamW TTT
author: senstar-hsoleimani
description: Combines XSA on all 11 layers, Soft-Round QAT (tanh-based differentiable rounding), Full GPTQ with Hessian-aware error compensation, MHA 8/8 with MLP 3.5x (1792 hidden), BigramHash(8192), selective magnitude pruning, and AdamW-based legal score-first TTT with cosine LR. Built on the LeakyReLU² + Parallel Muon + EMA stack.
